Name: COP3530 - Data Structures
Description: This course introduces fundamentals of data structures. Topics include: programming strategies, data structures, searching, complexity, queues, sorting, and algorithms. Extensive programming is required.

Modules.ModuleName: 1. Getting Started: JavaScript and JSFiddle Environment
2 - Lists and Arrays: Structure and Introduction to Big O Notation
3- Lists and Arrays: Algorithms and Operations
4- The Stack: Structure and Use Cases
The Queue: Structure and Use Cases
Computational Complexity: Deep Dive into Analysis
Hash Tables: Structure and Collision Resolution
Hash Algorithms and Applications: Password Hashing and Beyond
Binary Trees: Structure, Traversal, and Operations
Advanced Tree Structures: AVL Trees, Heaps, and Tries
Applied Data Structures: Blockchain, Digital Currency, and Beyond
